plan_metadata.name: Feature Basic Tab Instant Tab Local

steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or specify the project directory.
Click the "Allow" button on the browser permission popup requesting access for "teams.cloud.microsoft" to access other apps and services on this device in the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the browser tab close button (X) in the top-right corner of the "Microsoft Teams" web application interface, closing the current Teams chat window.
Enter 'https://localhost:3978/tabs/home' into the Google Chrome address bar on a new tab page.
Press the Enter key in the Chrome address bar after entering "https://localhost:3978/tabs/home" to navigate to the specified URL.
Click the "Advanced" button on the Chrome privacy error page to expand additional options for proceeding to the unsafe (localhost) site.
Click the "Proceed to localhost (unsafe)" link on the Chrome browser's privacy error page to bypass the security warning and access the localhost site.
Click the browser tab labeled "Home" at the top of the Google Chrome window to activate it.
Click the "Home" tab in the Microsoft Teams web interface, within the "General" channel of the "ATK Testing05" team.

Click the "Reload tab" option in the context menu of a tab within the Microsoft Teams web application, accessed via Google Chrome. The action is visually confirmed by a red crosshair over the "Reload tab" menu item.
Click the "Home" tab in the chat window of the Microsoft Teams web application to display the Home view for the selected team channel.

Click the "Remove" option in the Home tab dropdown menu within the Microsoft Teams web interface. The action targets the menu item for removing the tab, as indicated by the red crosshair at position (778, 494).
Click the "Remove" button in the confirmation dialog to permanently remove the Home tab in Microsoft Teams web interface.
